project_profile.deployment_model: Linux 边缘网关服务，单进程同步 HTTP 服务，通过 POSIX socket 监听 INADDR_ANY (0.0.0.0) 上的 TCP 端口，默认 8080。无 TLS，无认证中间件，无速率限制。

trust_boundaries.untrusted_side: Shell commands executed via popen() with user-controlled input
User-controlled file paths via query parameters

modules.name: HTTP Server
evidence: src/http_server.cpp:82 socket(AF_INET, SOCK_STREAM, 0)
src/http_server.cpp:92 address.sin_addr.s_addr = INADDR_ANY
src/http_server.cpp:106 accept(fd, nullptr, nullptr)
src/http_server.cpp:113 recv(client, buffer, sizeof(buffer) - 1, 0)

modules.name: User Store / Authentication
evidence: src/user_store.cpp:7-9 hardcoded users with weak djb2 hash
src/user_store.cpp:12-18 weakHash() uses non-cryptographic djb2 algorithm
src/user_store.cpp:34-36 predictable session tokens sess-{user}-{timestamp}

modules.name: File Cache
evidence: src/file_cache.cpp:11 baseDir_ + "/" + name with no path sanitization
src/file_cache.cpp:22 hardcoded token check token != "letmein-export"

modules.name: Diagnostics
evidence: src/diagnostics.cpp:8 std::string command = "ping -c 1 " + host
src/diagnostics.cpp:12 popen(command.c_str(), "r") with unsanitized user input

modules.name: Audit Log
evidence: include/audit_log.hpp:11 event() logs user, action, detail to file

modules.name: Main / Router
evidence: src/main.cpp:36-74 registers 5 HTTP route handlers
src/main.cpp:13-16 queryValue() extracts query parameters from requests
contains all HTTP route handler lambdas and query parameter extraction
contains socket/bind/listen/accept/recv, request parsing, response serialization
hardcoded credentials, weak hash, predictable session tokens
unsanitized file path concatenation, hardcoded admin token
popen() with unsanitized user-controlled shell command
defines HttpRequest/HttpResponse structs and HttpServer class interface
declares FileCache class with readTextFile and exportSnapshot
declares UserStore class with authenticate, isAdmin, issueSession
declares Diagnostics class with pingHost
header-only AuditLog class, file-based event logging

entry_points.name: GET /health
entry_points.justification: TCP 0.0.0.0 上的公开 HTTP 端点，任何远程客户端可访问，但仅返回固定字符串，攻击面极小
evidence: src/main.cpp:36 server.route("GET", "/health", ...)

entry_points.name: POST /login
entry_points.justification: TCP 0.0.0.0 上的认证端点，远程客户端可通过 query 参数提交用户名和密码，是暴力破解和凭证填充的攻击目标
entry_points.description: User authentication endpoint with query-string credentials
evidence: src/main.cpp:40 server.route("POST", "/login", ...)
src/main.cpp:41-42 extracts user and password from query parameters
src/main.cpp:45 calls users.authenticate(username, password)

entry_points.name: GET /files
entry_points.justification: TCP 0.0.0.0 上的文件下载端点，远程客户端可通过 name 参数指定任意文件路径，存在路径遍历风险
entry_points.description: File download endpoint with user-controlled filename
evidence: src/main.cpp:54 server.route("GET", "/files", ...)
src/main.cpp:55 extracts name from query parameter
src/main.cpp:58 calls files.readTextFile(name) which concatenates baseDir_ + "/" + name without sanitization

entry_points.name: POST /debug/ping
entry_points.justification: TCP 0.0.0.0 上的诊断端点，远程客户端可通过 host 参数注入任意 shell 命令，是最严重的远程代码执行攻击面
entry_points.description: Diagnostic ping endpoint with user-controlled host parameter passed to popen()
evidence: src/main.cpp:64 server.route("POST", "/debug/ping", ...)
src/main.cpp:65 extracts host from query parameter
src/main.cpp:67 calls diagnostics.pingHost(host) which executes popen("ping -c 1 " + host)

entry_points.name: GET /admin/export
entry_points.justification: TCP 0.0.0.0 上的管理员导出端点，使用硬编码 token 进行认证，任何能访问服务的远程客户端可尝试猜测或使用泄露的 token
entry_points.description: Admin export endpoint with hardcoded token authentication
evidence: src/main.cpp:70 server.route("GET", "/admin/export", ...)
src/main.cpp:71 extracts token from query parameter
src/main.cpp:73 calls files.exportSnapshot(token) which checks against hardcoded "letmein-export"

attack_surfaces: TCP socket on INADDR_ANY (0.0.0.0): any remote client can connect without authentication
Command injection via /debug/ping: user-controlled host parameter passed directly to popen() shell command
Path traversal via /files: user-controlled name parameter concatenated with base directory without sanitization
Hardcoded credentials in source: alice/wonderland, operator/op-password, admin/admin123
Hardcoded admin token: letmein-export in file_cache.cpp:22
Weak password hashing: non-cryptographic djb2 hash used for password storage
Credentials in URL query string: passwords transmitted in URL, logged to audit file
No TLS/HTTPS: all traffic including credentials transmitted in plaintext
Fixed 4096-byte recv buffer: no handling of requests exceeding buffer size
No rate limiting: brute force attacks on /login endpoint unrestricted
